Our Products

Product Range

Four series of high-quality electric products for new energy and power infrastructure.

EV Charging Stations

AC and DC charging stations from 3.5kW to 400kW for home, commercial, and industrial use. OCPP-compliant with smart management.

  • Home & Commercial DC Charger 20kW–60kW
  • AD Screen DC Charger 60kW–360kW
  • DC Charger 60kW–400kW
  • Smart AC Charger 3.5kW–22kW
View Products

Photovoltaic Energy Storage Systems

Integrated solar + storage solutions that maximize new energy utilization and reduce grid dependency for commercial and industrial clients.

  • Utility-Scale Energy Storage
  • Commercial Solar + Storage
  • Integrated PV-Storage-Charging
View Products

Power Transformers

High-reliability power transformers designed for demanding industrial and utility applications with long operational lifetimes.

  • Oil-Immersed Transformers
  • Dry-Type Transformers
  • Special Transformers
View Products

High & Low Voltage Switchgears

Complete range of HV and LV switchgear solutions for safe and reliable power distribution in complex electrical systems.

  • High Voltage Switchgear
  • Low Voltage Switchgear
  • Ring Main Units
View Products

EV Fast Charging — a global clean energy technology company dedicated to next-generation electric vehicle charging solutions and smart energy infrastructure.

  • Residential Fast Charging
  • Commercial Charging Network
